info.description: API for managing sandboxes, organizations, billing, and hosts
info.title: Fluid API

get.description: Redirect to GitHub OAuth authorization page
Handle GitHub OAuth callback, create or link user, set session cookie, and redirect to dashboard
Redirect to Google OAuth authorization page
Handle Google OAuth callback, create or link user, set session cookie, and redirect to dashboard

post.description: Authenticate with email and password, returns a session cookie
Invalidate the current session and clear the session cookie
Create a new user account and return a session cookie

get.description: List all organizations the current user belongs to

post.description: Create a new organization and add the current user as owner

patch.description: Update organization details (owner or admin only)

get.description: List all host tokens for the organization

post.description: Generate a new host authentication token (owner or admin only)

delete.description: Delete a host token (owner or admin only)

get.description: Get details of a specific connected host
List all members of an organization

post.description: Add a user to an organization (owner or admin only)

delete.description: Remove a member from an organization (owner or admin only)

get.description: List all sandboxes in the organization

post.description: Create a new sandbox in the organization from a source VM or base image

delete.description: Destroy a sandbox and release its resources

get.description: List all commands executed in a sandbox
Get the IP address of a sandbox

post.description: Execute a command in a sandbox
Create a snapshot of a sandbox
Prepare a source VM for sandbox cloning
Read a file from a source VM
Execute a read-only command on a source VM

get.description: List all source VMs across connected hosts
